text: Hey Kelly, heard one of the longtime counselors is retiring from Hanover County next month. You going to the luncheon on the 20th?
Planning on it, yeah. 22 years is worth showing up for. Feels weird she's out before half our grad class even hits 40 😅
Lol right. Think anyone from the old crew will make it out? Haven't seen most of them since the 2022 conference.
No clue. I'll probably duck out after the lunch part, Nora's got a thing that evening and Greg's out of town.
Makes sense. Maybe see you there.
